About Me

Systems Thinker.
Operations Driver.

I'm Randall Clay Semilla, a Filipino Executive Assistant and CRM Automation Specialist with 4+ years of full-time remote experience. I've supported B2B companies, insurance agencies, real estate investors, e-commerce brands, and everything in between.

My specialty is turning chaos into clean, trackable, repeatable systems — whether that's a GoHighLevel pipeline, a sales reporting dashboard, an automated email sequence, or a full team operations workflow.

I've been promoted from EA to Team Manager, overseeing up to 8 virtual assistants across 6+ concurrent client accounts. I don't just execute — I document, improve, and scale.

Currently supporting the Sales Performance Coach of a nationally ranked #1 Allstate agency in the United States (2024 & 2025).

⚙️

CRM Architecture

GoHighLevel pipelines, workflows, automations, Zapier integrations, and Shopify/Zoom/Freshdesk connections built from scratch.

📊

Sales & Pipeline Reporting

KPI dashboards, quote-to-close tracking, conversion analysis, and structured performance reports for sales leadership.

🧠

Operations & Team Management

SOPs in Notion, weekly client reports, onboarding coordination, and team oversight across multi-industry accounts.

📣

Email & Digital Marketing

Lead nurturing sequences, SMS campaigns, B2B outreach, event promotions, and social media content across GHL, Mailchimp, and more.

Portfolio

Notable Work
& Projects

A selection of high-impact work from real client engagements across my career.

GoHighLevel · Automation
Weekly FAQ Email Workflow
Built a GHL automation that sends FAQ emails to Bignition clients every Friday, including video tutorials and answers to the most common support questions.
Automated weekly email delivery to all active users
Educational content with embedded video tutorials
Reduced inbound support tickets for the client team
Integration · Zapier · Shopify
Shopify → Course Access Automation
Integrated Shopify with GoHighLevel via Zapier. When a customer purchases a book, they are automatically granted access to the corresponding video course in GHL.
Fully automatic course access delivery on purchase
Seamless Shopify + Zapier + GHL 3-way integration
Eliminated manual access provisioning entirely
E-Commerce · Automation · Events
Event Ticketing + GHL Automation
Created a Shopify storefront for an in-person coaching event connected to a GHL workflow that sends confirmations, event details, and grants access to exclusive courses.
Event ticket sales & checkout via Shopify storefront
Automated confirmation emails & event reminders
Exclusive GHL course access granted post-purchase
CRM & Pipeline · HubSpot
HubSpot Sales Pipeline & Sequences
Designed a custom sales pipeline in HubSpot to manage leads through every stage of the buyer journey with automated sequences and tasks to improve follow-up and conversion.
Custom pipeline: Lead → Prospect → Quoted → Customer
Automated follow-up sequences and task reminders
Full deal visibility across 204 active opportunities
Sales Reporting · Insurance
Agency Performance Dashboard — Gaudio Insurance (Allstate #1 US)
Designed and maintained structured sales reporting systems for the #1 ranked Allstate agency in the US, giving the Sales Performance Coach real-time visibility into every agent's production metrics.
Weekly & monthly reports tracking warm transfers, quotes issued, and policies written per agent
Quote-to-close ratio monitoring and conversion trend analysis across multiple lead sources
CRM data accuracy maintenance and performance gap identification for coaching intervention
Team Operations · VA Agency
Multi-Account Team Management
Promoted to Team Manager at ResolutionX, overseeing 8 VAs across 6+ concurrent client accounts spanning 5+ industries simultaneously.
Built and maintained SOPs for each client account in Notion
Weekly & monthly performance reports for all client campaigns

Trained VAs on GoHighLevel, automation workflows, and CRM best practices — upskilling the team in core specializations
